name: Olive Garden San Remo
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Green bell peppers, cut into strips
8 oz Yellow onion, halved into 1/2 inch strips
32 oz Canned tomatoes with juice, halved
2 lb Boneless skinless chicken breast, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add peppers, onions, and mushrooms; sauté, stirring constantly for 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Add garlic and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in tomatoes, herbs, wine, and bouillon. Lower heat and let simmer while preparing chicken.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large non-stick skillet. Dredge chicken in flour; sauté until golden.
6. Do not crowd the skillet; add more olive oil as necessary.
7. Add browned pieces of chicken to the tomato-pepper sauce. When all pieces have been added, cover and simmer for 10 minutes to finish cooking the chicken.
8. Serve sauce over cooked pasta.
